{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Identifies several inconsistencies and proposes revisions to improve logical flow.",
    "R1.3": "Flags some claims that lack sufficient evidence but misses others.",
    "RX.1": "Acknowledges uncertainty in some claims but could be more explicit about confidence levels.",
    "RX.3": "Output stays within the requested scope and addresses all dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "Introduces potential regressions by making strong claims without sufficient backing.",
    "RX.5": "Provides some traceability but lacks detailed annotations for all changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies several inconsistencies and proposes revisions to improve logical flow.
rationale.R1.3: Flags some claims that lack sufficient evidence but misses others.
rationale.RX.1: Acknowledges uncertainty in some claims but could be more explicit about confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the requested scope and addresses all dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: Introduces potential regressions by making strong claims without sufficient backing.
rationale.RX.5: Provides some traceability but lacks detailed annotations for all changes.
